# Filtres

## Call pour récupérer les chunks d'un document en spécifiant la source

### Template

```
POST /collections/<collection>/points/scroll
{
    "filter": {
        "must": [
            { "key": "metadata.source", "match": { "value": "data/<doc_id>.<extension>" } }
        ]
    }
}
```

### Exemple

```
POST /collections/hybrid_RCTS_1000_200_all_formats/points/scroll
{
    "filter": {
        "must": [
            { "key": "metadata.source", "match": { "value": "data/33f4883d8d8c56a98d3ae27c80f7e1be.pdf" } }
        ]
    }
}
```

# Hybrid search

## Template

```
POST /collections/hybrid_RCTS_1000_200_all_formats/points/query
{
    "prefetch": [
        {
            "query": { 
                "indices": <sparse_query_vector_indices>,
                "values": <sparse_query_vector_values>
             },
            "using": "langchain-sparse",
            "limit": 100
        },
        {
            "query": <dense_query_embedding>,
            "limit": 100
        }
    ],
    "query": { "fusion": "rrf" },
    "with_payload": true,
    "with_vector": false,
    "limit": 100
}
```

}
